attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY,
 WEM.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,
 WEM.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,
 WEM.SK_BATCH_ID_INT,
 WEM.SS_CD,
 WEM.CREATION_DTM AS CREATED_DTM,
 WEM.CREATION_DATE AS DV_CREATED_DT,
 WEM.ERROR_MESSAGE_TEXT AS ERROR_MESSAGE_TXT,
 COALESCE(WEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 COALESCE(WEM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WEM.ERROR_CODE,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WEM.ACTION_CODE,
 CASE WHEN NEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END  AS DML_TYPE 
FROM(
SELECT
SMERS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY,
SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,
SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT,-999)  AS  SK_BATCH_ID_INT ,
SMERS.SS_CD,
SLERS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DTM, 
CAST(SLERS.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)CREATION_DATE ,
EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_TEXT,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
EENER.ERROR_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_LINE_ERRS SLERS 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_ENTL_ERRS EENER
ON EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE =SLERS.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
AND EENER.GLOBAL_NAME = SLERS.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG SMERS
ON SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT=EENER.ENTL_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT =SLERS.LINE_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SS_CD='QTC'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SLERS.LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SMERS.SS_CD

UNION ALL

SELECT
SMERS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY ,
SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,
SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT,-999)  AS  SK_BATCH_ID_INT ,
SMERS.SS_CD,
SLERS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DTM, 
CAST(SLERS.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)CREATION_DATE ,
EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_TEXT,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
EENER.ERROR_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_LINE_ERRS SLERS 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_ENTL_ERRS EENER
ON EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE =SLERS.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
AND EENER.GLOBAL_NAME = SLERS.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG SMERS
ON SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT=EENER.ENTL_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT =SLERS.LINE_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SS_CD='BV'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SLERS.LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SMERS.SS_CD

UNION ALL

SELECT
SMERS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY ,
SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,
SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT,-999)  AS  SK_BATCH_ID_INT ,
SMERS.SS_CD,
SLERS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DTM, 
CAST(SLERS.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)CREATION_DATE ,
EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_TEXT,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'X' AS ACTION_CODE,
EENER.ERROR_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_LINE_ERRS SLERS 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_ENTL_ERRS EENER
ON EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE =SLERS.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
AND EENER.GLOBAL_NAME = SLERS.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG SMERS
ON SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT=EENER.ENTL_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT =SLERS.LINE_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SS_CD='QTC'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SLERS.LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SMERS.SS_CD

UNION ALL

SELECT
SMERS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY ,
SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,
SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT,-999)  AS  SK_BATCH_ID_INT,
SMERS.SS_CD,
SLERS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DTM, 
CAST(SLERS.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)CREATION_DATE ,
EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_TEXT,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'X' AS ACTION_CODE,
EENER.ERROR_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_LINE_ERRS SLERS 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_ENTL_ERRS EENER
ON EENER.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE =SLERS.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
AND EENER.GLOBAL_NAME = SLERS.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG SMERS
ON SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT=EENER.ENTL_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT =SLERS.LINE_ERROR_ID
AND SMERS.SS_CD='BV'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SLERS.LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SMERS.SS_CD
)  WEM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG NEM
ON WEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY=NEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY

SELECT 
 WEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY,
 WEM.ENTL_ERROR_ID AS SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,
 WEM.LINE_ERROR_ID AS SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,
 WEM.SRC_BATCH_ID AS SK_BATCH_ID_INT,
 WEM.SS_CODE AS SS_CD,
 WEM.CREATION_DTM AS CREATED_DTM,
 WEM.CREATION_DATE AS DV_CREATED_DT,
 WEM.ERROR_MESSAGE AS ERROR_MESSAGE_TXT,
 COALESCE(WEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -999) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 COALESCE(WEM.SALES_ORDER_KEY, -999) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WEM.ERROR_CODE,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WEM.ACTION_CODE,
 CASE WHEN NEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END  AS DML_TYPE 
FROM(
SELECT
SMERS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,-999) AS ENTL_ERROR_ID,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,-999) AS LINE_ERROR_ID,
SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT AS SRC_BATCH_ID,
SMERS.SS_CD AS SS_CODE,
SLERS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DTM, 
CAST(SLERS.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)CREATION_DATE ,
SLERS.ERROR_MESSAGE,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
SLERS.ERROR_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_SRVC_ERRS_IN_INTF SLERS 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG SMERS
ON SLERS.SRC_BATCH_ID=SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT
AND SMERS.SS_CD='CG'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SLERS.LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SMERS.SS_CD

UNION ALL
SELECT
SMERS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_ENTITLEMENT_ERROR_ID_INT,-999) AS ENTL_ERROR_ID,
COALESCE(SMERS.SK_LINE_ERROR_ID_INT,-999) AS LINE_ERROR_ID,
SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT AS SRC_BATCH_ID,
SMERS.SS_CD AS SS_CODE,
SLERS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DTM, 
CAST(SLERS.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)CREATION_DATE ,
SLERS.ERROR_MESSAGE,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'X' AS ACTION_CODE,
SLERS.ERROR_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXGCO_SRVC_ERRS_IN_INTF SLERS 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG SMERS
ON SLERS.SRC_BATCH_ID=SMERS.SK_BATCH_ID_INT
AND SMERS.SS_CD='CG'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SLERS.LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SMERS.SS_CD

)  WEM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG NEM
ON WEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY=NEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_ERROR_MSG_KEY

SELECT STBLE.LINE_ERROR_ID,
 STBLE.LINE_ID,
 STBLE.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE,
 STBLE.CREATION_DATE,
 STBLE.CREATED_BY,
 STBLE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 STBLE.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 STBLE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 STBLE.REQUEST_ID,
 STBLE.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
 STBLE.PROGRAM_ID,
 STBLE.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
 STBLE.VALID_FLAG,
 STBLE.BATCH_ID,
 STBLE.CREATE_DATETIME,
 STBLE.ACTION_CODE,
 STBLE.GLOBAL_NAME,
 STBLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 STBLE.REFRESH_DATETIME,
 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_LINE_ERRS STBLE
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_ENTL_ERRS ELERS
 WHERE STBLE.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE=ELERS.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
 AND STBLE.GLOBAL_NAME=ELERS.GLOBAL_NAME)
 OR NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 WHERE STBLE.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND SS_CODE ='BV')

SELECT STULE.LINE_ERROR_ID,
 STULE.LINE_ID,
 STULE.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE,
 STULE.CREATION_DATE,
 STULE.CREATED_BY,
 STULE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 STULE.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 STULE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 STULE.REQUEST_ID,
 STULE.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
 STULE.PROGRAM_ID,
 STULE.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
 STULE.VALID_FLAG,
 STULE.BATCH_ID,
 STULE.CREATE_DATETIME,
 STULE.ACTION_CODE,
 STULE.GLOBAL_NAME,
 STULE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 STULE.REFRESH_DATETIME,
 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_LINE_ERRS STULE
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCCA_SVC_CTRT_ENTL_ERRS ELERS
 WHERE STULE.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE=ELERS.ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
 AND ELERS.GLOBAL_NAME = STULE.GLOBAL_NAME )
 OR NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 WHERE STULE.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND SS_CODE='QTC')

SELECT STER.LINE_INT_SEQUENCE_ID,
STER.HEADER_ID,
STER.LINE_ID,
STER.ERROR_CODE,
STER.ERROR_MESSAGE,
STER.STATUS,
STER.REFERENCEID,
STER.SOURCE_CONTROL_ID,
STER.SOURCESYSTEM,
STER.CREATION_DATE,
STER.CREATED_BY,
STER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STER.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STER.REQUEST_ID,
STER.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
STER.PROGRAM_ID,
STER.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
STER.SRC_BATCH_ID,
STER.BATCH_ID,
STER.CREATE_DATETIME,
STER.ACTION_CODE,
STER.GLOBAL_NAME,
STER.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
STER.REFRESH_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_SRVC_ERRS_IN_INTF STER
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 WHERE STER.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND SS_CODE ='CG')
